titleStmt.title: SII 22.292: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 292. (A.R. No. 292 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—10th YEAR (A.D. 1021-22)

summary.p: This has also the same introduction like the above, but shorter in length. Some portions are lost. It registers a gift of 115 kāśu for the daily supply of 4 kaḻañju of śidāri incence to the temple at Tirumālpēṟu by Kōvaṉ Āchchaṉ alias Madhurāntaka-Pallavaraiyaṉ, a native of Āḍippuliyūr in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu, a division of Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu in Śoḻamaṇḍalam. The amount was invested with the sabhā of Punnai alias Parakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Valla-nāḍu. It also registers another gift of 60 kāśu to the temple made by the same donor for the daily unguents to the deity, which was left in-charge of the Ūrār of Nittavinōdanallūr in Dāmar-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porccayappāvaiyuñ cirttaniccelviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭitiyilūḻi Iṭaituṟaiy nāṭun tuṭarvaṉa velipaṭar vaṉavāsiyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakka
mum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tam muṭiyu māṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉnavarpakkaṟ ṟeṉnavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eripaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟcūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palarpuka
ḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan tivum ceruviṟcinavi Irupattoru kālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanitikkulap perumalaikaḷum māpporu
taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa śrī rājentracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tāmarkkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭup puṉ(va)ṉaiyāna parakulāntakac caturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom coḻamaṇṭalattu kṣatriyaśikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu Āṭippuliyūr Āṭippuliyūruṭaiyān kovaṉ Āccaṉāṉa maturān=takappallavaraiyaṉ tāmarkko
ṭṭattu vallanāṭṭut tirumāṟpeṟṟumāhādevarkku nicatam nāṟkaḻañcu citāri Iṭuvatāka nivantañ ceyyak kuṭutta kācu nūṟṟorupattaiñcu Ikkācu nūṟṟorupattaiñcum Ittirumāṟpeṟṟu tiripuvanaśaṇḍeśvararpakkal Ippuṉṉaiyāṉa parakulāntakaccatuvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom koṇṭu Ikkācukkup policai tiṅkaḷ mukkālpoṉ policaiyāka Ā
maṇṭalattut tāmarkkoṭṭattut tāmarnāṭṭut tāmarāṉa ṉittaviṉotanallūr
Ūrom coḻamaṇṭalattut kṣatriyaśikhāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu Āṭippuliyūr Āṭippuliyūruṭaiyāṉ kovaṉ Āccaṉnāṉa maturāntakap pallavaraiyaṉ tāmarkkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭu tirumālpeṟṟu mādevarkku nicati Irupalacci
taṇṇaiy tirumaippūccukkum kuṭutta kācu Aṟupatu Ikkācu Aṟupatum koṇṭu Ikkācukku palicai tiṅkaḷ Eḻumañcāṭi yāka Āṇṭu varai Iṭuvatāṉa poṉ nāṟkaḻañcaraiya nālumañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉ
ṟiyum dhanmakaṭṭaḷaittuḷainiṟaip tiṅkaḷḷopāti Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattu vaiccut taravukoḷvatākavum Ippoṉ taṇṭavantārkku mekkaṇṭu nica
tam Iraṇṭucoṟu kuṭuppatāka Ipparicu Ippolicai muṭṭil muṭṭiṉa nāḷ mutal nāḷoṉ nicati pattup poṉ maṉṟap peṟuvitākavum Immaṉṟu
pāṭiṟutti cantirātittaval Ivūr karaṇattāṉ civaśikha
brāhmaṇaṉ ṉeḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 22.292 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
